search_queries: GKN Aerospace Garden Grove chemical tank methyl methacrylate evacuation
Garden Grove chemical tank emergency evacuation May 2026
ABC7 Garden Grove chemical tank live updates crack temperature
KTLA Garden Grove toxic tank YouTube video Orange County
NBC Los Angeles Garden Grove chemical tank methyl methacrylate explainer video

Orange County Register Garden Grove chemical tank GKN evacuation
Garden Grove chemical tank YouTube ABC News NBC LA Fox 11 video coverage May 24 2026
audit.notes: The incident is REAL and broadly verifiable across major national and Los Angeles / Orange County outlets, plus a dedicated Wikipedia article (en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Garden_Grove_chemical_leak) citing ~50 sources (LA Times, Guardian, CNN, CBS, Reuters, NPR, NYT, NBC, KTLA, ABC7, OC Register, AP). Core facts cross-confirmed: GKN Aerospace facility at 12122 Western Ave, Garden Grove; methyl methacrylate (MMA) tank overheating from ~2026-05-21 (~3:30-3:40pm PDT Thursday); ~50,000 evacuated over a ~9 sq mi zone (Stanton + parts of Garden Grove, Anaheim, Buena Park, Cypress, Westminster); Gov. Newsom state of emergency Sat 2026-05-23; OC DA Todd Spitzer criminal probe; class-action by X-Law Group + Presidio Law Firm; OCFA incident command (Covey, McGovern); rising internal temp (77F -> 90F -> >100F gauge-max); crack(s) found in overnight recon. All 6 YouTube IDs in the seed set resolve and their titles match the incident. CAVEATS: (1) Exact publish TIMESTAMPS for most items are approximate -- search/fetch surfaces dates but rarely minute-level publish times; ISO times carried from the seed or estimated are flagged per-item via published_iso_confidence. (2) WebFetch on YouTube returns the video title but the truncated page did NOT expose the channel name, so outlet attribution for video items relies on the seed + the search-result snippets that named the reporting outlet (e.g. KTLA's own timeline references these clips). (3) The seed ABC7 'entry' deep-links (per-update fragments under .../19152918/entry/NNNN/) are part of a live blog; the parent live-blog URL and the temperature entry (19158460) were directly verified to resolve, but not every individual entry fragment was independently fetched. (4) One seed published_iso looks like a likely data-entry artifact: the ABC7 'Map shows potential OC blast zone' item carries 2026-05-24T07:08:00Z which is plausible but unverified to the minute.
audit.knowledge_cutoff_note: Event postdates the assistant training cutoff (Jan 2026). ALL facts here are sourced from live WebSearch/WebFetch performed 2026-05-25, not from model memory.
